name: @evertrust/stream-mcp
description: MCP server for Evertrust Stream 2.1 (PKI: CA, VA/OCSP, TSA, SSH)

scripts.build:binary: bun run build && bun build --compile dist/index.js --outfile dist/stream-mcp
scripts.build:binaries: bun run build && bun build --compile dist/index.js --outfile dist/stream-mcp-linux-x64 --target=bun-linux-x64 && bun build --compile dist/index.js --outfile dist/stream-mcp-linux-arm64 --target=bun-linux-arm64 && bun build --compile dist/index.js --outfile dist/stream-mcp-darwin-x64 --target=bun-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile dist/index.js --outfile dist/stream-mcp-darwin-arm64 --target=bun-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile dist/index.js --outfile dist/stream-mcp-windows-x64.exe --target=bun-windows-x64
scripts.validate:ci: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run verify:truth && bun run test && bun run test:scenarios
